title: EV Roundup: RIDE Files for Bankruptcy, WKHS Hits Milestones
text: Workhorse Group achieved key milestones in the EV space despite broader EV sector challenges. While some EV companies faced bankruptcy including Lordstown Motors (RIDE), Workhorse continued advancing commercial EV operations. The company secured major partnerships with FedEx, expanded its product line with the W56 extended wheelbase, and achieved regulatory approvals in Canada. Workhorse's focus on last-mile delivery vehicles and commercial fleets positioned it differently from consumer EV manufacturers facing market pressures. The company's strategic partnerships with fleet operators and dealers demonstrated market validation despite industry headwinds.
